mapper.select:
SELECT id, tenant_id, operator_id, operator_type, operation_type, operation_target, target_id, operation_content, operation_result, error_message, ip_address, user_agent, create_time FROM registry_operation_log
AND tenant_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.tenantId}, '%')
AND operator_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.operatorId}, '%')
AND operator_type LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.operatorType}, '%')
AND operation_type LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.operationType}, '%')
AND operation_target LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.operationTarget}, '%')
AND target_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.targetId}, '%')
AND operation_content LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.operationContent}, '%')
AND operation_result LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.operationResult}, '%')
AND user_agent LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.userAgent}, '%')
